name: 01_reg_mux
title: Register behind a mux
description: An 8-bit register driven by a 2:1 mux with sync reset, the simplest possible endpoint with a shallow one-level fanin cone.

name: 02_priority_encoder
title: Wide priority encoder
description: A 32-bit priority encoder feeding a registered 5-bit index and valid bit, synthesizing to a deep priority comparison chain.

name: 03_adder_chain
title: Sequential adder chain
description: A chain of four sequential 16-bit adds combined combinationally before a register, producing the deepest carry-propagation path in the example set.

name: 04_high_fanout_enable
title: High-fanout enable
description: A single enable input gates writes to sixteen independent 8-bit registers, making the enable net the top entry in fanout ranking.

name: 05_shared_logic
title: Shared combinational cone
description: One moderately complex combinational expression (a*3 via shift and add) feeds three different registers through different extra logic, sharing a common fanin cone.

name: 06_comb_output
title: Purely combinational output
description: A clockless 16-bit comparator and mux driving a top-level output, demonstrating a design whose paths terminate at output ports rather than registers.

name: 07_blackbox
title: Blackbox boundary
description: Instantiates an opaque blackbox core between combinational logic and a register, showing how timing paths break at a blackbox's input/output ports.

name: 08_fsm
title: Small Moore FSM
description: A five-state Moore finite state machine with a single state register, a combinational next-state cone, and state-only output logic.
